source_scope: source/national-standard full raw originals plus existing processed/index layers
manifest_note: package_manifest.json and archive file are not included in the self-referential files list; package_manifest.json is included in the zip.
known_issues: 234 Canada BC document cards in the existing operational card file use an old source_path prefix; standards-source-index.csv uses actual package paths.
Full outcome-level extraction remains pending by subject.
